calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Oct-22-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Elder or Dependent Adult Abuse TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204, Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, CSR: Arlene Howell, CSR# 2542. Bailiff: J. Cappozoli.

Petitioner: Viley Roy Butler Sr. present.
Witness for the Petitioner: Teresa Lawanda Jones present.

No appearance by the Respondent: Beth Torrance.

Parties were sworn and examined.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Petitioner's order is Granted as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 50 yards away from the protected person: Viley Roy Butler Sr., his Residence, and Vehicles.

Respondent shall not Harass, Attack, Strike, Threaten, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Follow, Stalk, Destroy Personal Property, Keep under Surveillance, or Block Movements, Contact (directly or indirectly), Telephone, Send Messages, Mail or e-Mail, Take Any Action, Directly or Through Others, to Obtain the Addresses or Locations of the Protected Persons.

The Move-Out order was not granted since the Petitioner stated the Respondent had already vacated the premises.

Expires October 22, 2012

Order signed in open court.
